  1. org.springframework.ai.chat.messages

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.chat.messages

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.chat.messages
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.bedrock
 
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse.api
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.memory

org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.jdbc
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.mongo

org.springframework.ai.chat.memory.repository.redis
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.messages

org.springframework.ai.chat.prompt
 
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.model.anthropic.autoconfigure
 
org.springframework.ai.model.tool
 
org.springframework.ai.rag
This package contains the core interfaces and classes supporting Retrieval Augmented Generation flows.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.messages used by org.springframework.ai.anthropic

    Description
    MessageType
    Enumeration representing types of Messages in a chat application.

    Class
    Description
    Message
    The Message interface represents a message that can be sent or received in a chat application.

  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.messages used by org.springframework.ai.chat.messages
    Class
    Description
    AbstractMessage
    The AbstractMessage class is an abstract implementation of the Message interface.
    AssistantMessage
    Lets the generative know the content was generated as a response to the user.
    AssistantMessage.Builder
     
    AssistantMessage.ToolCall
     
    Message
    The Message interface represents a message that can be sent or received in a chat application.
    MessageType
    Enumeration representing types of Messages in a chat application.
    SystemMessage
    A message of the type 'system' passed as input.
    SystemMessage.Builder
     
    ToolResponseMessage
    The ToolResponseMessage class represents a message with a function content in a chat application.
    ToolResponseMessage.Builder
     
    ToolResponseMessage.ToolResponse
     
    UserMessage
    A message of the type 'user' passed as input Messages with the user role are from the end-user or developer.
    UserMessage.Builder
